focus.label: memory cascade
focus.sub: container OOMs and the memory family
focus.narration: A single failure mode in detail — container_memory and its 30-node neighbourhood. OOM kills, working-set bytes, gotchas, and the agent that reasons over them.

focus_options.label: memory cascade
focus_options.sub: container OOMs and the memory family
focus_options.narration: A single failure mode in detail — container_memory and its 30-node neighbourhood. OOM kills, working-set bytes, gotchas, and the agent that reasons over them.

focus_options.label: network pressure
focus_options.sub: dropped packets and the conntrack family
focus_options.narration: container_network_* dropped packets — the network-pressure cascade. Linked to conntrack limits, kube-proxy mode, CNI plugin, and node interface state.

focus_options.label: storage I/O
focus_options.narration: kubelet_volume_manager_* — PVC mount lifecycle, plus container filesystem I/O time and inode usage. The storage-cascade neighbourhood the operator never wants to debug at 2 AM.
focus_options.seed_name: kubelet_volume_manager_* (~3 metrics) — full enumeration in Storage sheet

focus_options.label: etcd · control plane
focus_options.narration: etcd_disk_* — the heartbeat of the control plane. Disk fsync, WAL throughput, mvcc, network — and the apiserver that talks to it.
